artifact: Kept first-pass SQL; it executed successfully and returns the card names together with the maximum face converted mana cost value.
sql: SELECT c.name, c.faceconvertedmanacost FROM cards AS c WHERE c.faceconvertedmanacost = (SELECT MAX(faceconvertedmanacost) FROM cards) ORDER BY c.name;
